_rule: FROZEN PROMPT BLOCKS — gen-shots.js injects these into every prompt via [KEY] placeholders. Never hand-type or paraphrase character/set/style text in a shots.json. EP12 must use the exact bytes of EP1.

blocks.CHAR-PHUM: a Thai man in his 40s, medium build, short black hair, wearing a navy blue polo shirt and a gold wristwatch, seen from behind or in close-up on his hands, face never visible
blocks.CHAR-FAI: a young Thai woman in her early 20s, hair in a ponytail, wearing a beige apron over a white t-shirt, seen from behind, face never visible
blocks.CHAR-MONG-HAND: an older heavyset Thai-Chinese man's hand with a large gold ring tapping a smartphone screen, extreme close-up, face never visible
blocks.SET: small Thai wholesale shop interior at night, stacked cardboard boxes, shelves of household goods, warm tungsten lamp with blue and gold accent lighting
blocks.PHONE: a smartphone lying face-down on a wooden shop counter vibrating, screen glow spilling in the dark
blocks.LEDGER: a worn red-cover accounting ledger book on a wooden shop counter
blocks.STYLE: cinematic Thai TV drama, tense suspenseful mood, shallow depth of field, warm tungsten and teal color grade, smooth camera movement, no readable text, no signage, no logos
